title: EdgeQuota
description: Comprehensive observability dashboard for EdgeQuota rate-limiting reverse proxy.

panels.title: Latency Breakdown (P95)
panels.description: Breakdown of P95 latency by stage: auth check, external rate limit, and backend proxy.

panels.title: Top Tenants (Allowed + Limited)
panels.description: Per-tenant request rates. Capped at max_tenant_labels; overflow aggregated under __overflow__.

panels.title: In-Memory Fallback / sec by Pool
panels.description: Non-zero means Redis is unreachable for that pool.

panels.title: Rate Limit Redis: Allowed vs Limited
Rate Limit Redis: Remaining Tokens (P50 / P95)
panels.description: How many tokens remain in the bucket after each rate-limit check. Low values indicate keys close to exhaustion.

panels.title: External RL Cache Redis: Hit / Miss / Stale
panels.description: Cache performance for the external rate-limit service response cache backed by Redis.

panels.title: Events Dropped / sec
panels.description: Events dropped due to ring buffer overflow. Non-zero indicates the emitter cannot keep up with the event volume.

panels.title: Event Send Failures / sec
panels.description: Event batches that failed to send after all retries.

panels.title: Network I/O (container)
panels.description: Requires container network metrics from cAdvisor/kubelet. Falls back gracefully if unavailable.

panels.title: Time Since Last TLS Cert Reload
Time Since Last mTLS CA Reload
